news.headline: Anthropic valued at close to a trillion dollars in new funding round
news.summary: Artificial intelligence company Anthropic announced on Thursday that it had raised $65 billion in a new funding round, valuing the Claude maker (founded by former OpenAI employees and led by Dario Amodei) at $965 billion and placing it ahead of rival OpenAI.

news.headline: Iran ambassador hits out at ‘country to the north’ in US World Cup visa row
news.summary: Iran's football team still lacks US visas and is not competing on 'equal terms', Tehran's envoy to Mexico says.

news.headline: WHO chief says deadly Ebola outbreak in DR Congo can be stopped
news.summary: Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, the head of the World Health Organization, said Thursday that the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo, which has killed more than 200 people, can still be contained despite conflict in the country's east.
